workLog.action: Renamed local branch from feat/1774-autonomous to feat/1746-autonomous to match the issue number convention used by all sibling autonomous PRs.
Studied merged enterprise-patterns.md (loaded via project instructions) to lock voice, section shape, and naming. Read issue #1746 body for required content checklist.
workLog.outcome: Established target shape: 9 sections (Definitions, Core Discipline, When to Refactor, Code Smells, The Mechanics, Refactoring And Performance, Refactoring In Pull Requests, Anti-Patterns, Boundaries With Existing Codebase, Quick Self-Review). All six issue-required rules to be present and explicit.

workLog.action: Authored .claude/rules/refactoring.md (~12KB) covering: Definitions (refactoring vs behavior change vs smell vs transformation vs characterization test); Core Discipline (six non-negotiable rules); When to Refactor (Rule of Three, preparatory, comprehension, litter-pickup, planned); Code Smells (17 named smells with suggested transformations); The Mechanics (compiler-as-checklist, automated refactorings); Refactoring And Performance (clarity first, profile, isolate); Refactoring In Pull Requests (one hat per commit, conventional prefixes, ADR-008 budget); Anti-Patterns (drive-by, while-I-was-in-there, rename-during-behavior, no-tests-on-legacy, pattern-driven, big-bang, broken-build-deferred); Boundaries With Existing Codebase (ADR-008, atomic commits, conventional commits, session protocol, enterprise-patterns.md interaction); Quick Self-Review (7-question reviewer checklist).
workLog.outcome: Single new file. No edits to other files. All issue-required rules present and explicit. Avoided em-dashes per user-global style.
